tasks.desc: Ah, did I leave this piece unfinished?
I saw something similar in Lille.
How about we finish it together?
Let's straighten out the jagged edges!
I wonder what other pieces I forgot.
What is this? It is so dusty.
Oh my, how could I have forgotten about this one.
It has lost it's stone. The prongs got bent.
We should polish the stone. Only the brightest will do!
I should have the sketches somewhere.
This used to make more sense. I need inspiration!
I wish I could tell her of the lavender fields.
I want to keep it pristine.
Maddie, shall we make something for you?
Oh, I know just the right thing for you!
Some more gold to match your hair!
And then to add this grand sapphire.
It suits you, but what's with the dour look?
Oh Maddie, it seems I lost track of your wishes.
Tell you what, let's start over!
Silver, huh? I guess you are a bright winter.
The sharp corners are really bold. I love it!
Stuck? Think of something that screams YOU.
I have only seen such creativity in Musée d'Art Moderne.
Try it with these on too.
